inputs.label: Pet Age (Years)
inputs.businessContext: The age of the pet in completed years.

inputs.label: Pet Age (Months)
inputs.businessContext: Additional months beyond years, from 0 to 11.

inputs.label: Dog Size (if applicable)
inputs.businessContext: 1 for Small (<10 kg), 2 for Medium (10-25 kg), 3 for Large (>25 kg). Only used for dogs.

breakdown: Human age calculated based on standard veterinary guidelines.
For dogs: first year = 15 human years, second year = 9, then each additional year varies by size (small: 4, medium: 5, large: 6).
For cats: first year = 15, second year = 9, each additional year = 4.
